name: road-to-heaven-encounters-with-chinese-hermits
description: Bill Porter's (Red Pine) Road to Heaven — a journey into China's ancient hermit tradition in the Chungnan Mountains.
useCase: Understand China's five-thousand-year hermit tradition and what solitude, simplicity, and silence teach us.
knownRisks: Content discusses traditional Chinese spiritual practices within a modern political context
Some readers may find descriptions of extreme solitude challenging
